generated_oml:
instance AECOInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Infrastructure assets within AECO domain, exemplified by buildings spanning lifecycle from design to operations"
    base:contains BuildingAsset
]

instance BuildingAsset : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical infrastructure asset in AECO domain"
]

instance LiveOperationalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingAsset
]

instance SynchronizedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization between physical buildings and digital counterparts"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveOperationalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler, EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models used to define sensors, actuators, and controllers, creating a unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for real-time data exchange from physical assets"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for systematic embedding of live operational data into digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework coordinating roles for scalable deployment across infrastructure systems"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineer, FacilityManager, DTEngineer
]

instance BuildingControlEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role of Building Control Engineer in DT Framework"
]

instance FacilityManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role of Facility Manager in DT Framework"
]

instance DTEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role of DT Engineer in DT Framework"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight, DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for monitoring and control of infrastructure assets"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision support from custom analytics services integrated through standardized extension points"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Mechanisms feed control signals back to the Building Control System (BCS) through bidirectional communication channels between virtual and physical assets."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs a modular architecture with a centralized DT Framework acting as a hub for bidirectional data exchange, integrating components via standardized extension points. Runtime configuration management enables dynamic adjustments without redeployment, coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers for device modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring and control, and DT Engineers for service extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle spans initial BIM-based device modeling (sensors, actuators, controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)-driven transformation to structured representations and deployable artifacts, and operational phases featuring real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization. Stakeholder roles (Building Control Engineers for modeling and control logic, Facility Managers for monitoring and operation, DT Engineers for custom services) define lifecycle governance responsibilities with transitions managed through automated MDE processes and modular architecture."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto are integrated to provide robust connectivity for real-time data exchange across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "A model-driven deployment framework generates runtime interfaces for scalable digital twin deployment of building infrastructure systems."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via standardized extension points for custom service integration, maintainability through low-overhead updates."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework incorporates standardized extension points for interoperable custom service integration, but no specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IFC), compliance frameworks, or certification requirements are referenced in the document."
]
